hook.name: ArtCoinsHookSkimFee
hook.description: Uniswap v4 hook for ArtCoins token launches that skims a per-swap fee from swap volume and splits it three ways: a bounty leg, a protocol leg, and an optional referral leg. Implements a dynamic LP fee and an anti-sniper decay window that blocks public LP additions while the skim rate is elevated above its baseline.
